title: La zona vacía
overview: Luis is an astrophysicist who leads an orderly life with Angela. Everything changes when their new neighbors arrive with their daughter Iris. Overwhelmed by memories of a childhood love, he tries to control his emotions toward the girl so that his life does not fall apart. Luis finds himself immersed in a descent into his own personal hell, where everything seems to lead him to make the most terrible of decisions.
